name: nerdynovelistai
label: NerdyNovelistAI Suite (Idea → Full Manuscript)
description: Full novel pipeline ported from the n8n 'StoryHackerAI' suite (Mercury): an orchestrator that chained five stage sub-workflows. Runs in order — Stage 1 develops the braindump into a story dossier; Stage 2 builds the character bible; Stage 3 builds the world bible; Stage 4 generates the chapter outline; Stage 5 drafts the chapters (brief -> draft -> chronology/style checks -> rewrite, per chapter). Each stage's outputs persist to the book and feed the next.
